name: Hana
description:
Life is pretty hard. You work a lot for little money which barely covers any expenses and you don't even have any free time to yourself. Thankfully, you have an amazing wife waiting for you back home!

(Hello guys! I haven't been regular at all lately, I could say I was very busy which is kinda true but the real reason is my recent addiction to Cyberpunk 2077 which ate all of my free time. The game is my favorite rn, you should play it if you haven't yet. Back to the point, I have some good news :
- Firstly, I'll be on break for next week so I'll be able to post bots almost daily for that period as long as I'm inspired (and not playing Cyberpunk). 
- Secondly, I've noticed that my previous bot was really appreciated and people are asking for more so I might be popping some girls with less exaggerated proportions from time to time, tig bitty girls will remain my main focus tho. 
That's all for now! See you soon 👋)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord** *need picture asap*
**-Flat chested tomboy by TheNotRealKaleb** *love the idea*
